positive: A stylized, minimalist illustration of a majestic golden retriever silhouette running through a vibrant field of wildflowers at sunset. The style should be highly refined modern vector art with crisp lines and clean negative space. Use strong, saturated sunset gradients (deep orange, magenta, and gold) contrasted against a rich indigo sky. Focus on the dynamic movement of the dog and the flowing grass. The composition must be centered and adaptable for clothing prints, maintaining a strong visual impact and a perfect 768x768 square ratio. Use flat color washes with delicate watercolor texture blending.
